headlines.title: SOCIETY DEPARTMENT FUNDS TO BE CUT BY CITY
headlines.subtitle: Demands Made on the General Fund Causes City Fathers to Deduct $145,583.33 From Segregated Appropriations.

headlines.title: BIG BOND IS DOUBLED ON HIS SECOND VISIT
headlines.subtitle: Man in Court Second Time in a Week and Is Granted Bond, but the Justice Promises to Double It Again Next Time.

headlines.title: HUSBAND SPENT EVERYTHING
headlines.subtitle: In an Effort to Bring Wife's Troubles to End, and Finally Succeeds.

headlines.title: NEW RESERVOIR TO BEAR NAME OF LAKE WORTH

advertisements.description: Dolls and Toys for Every Child in Town on Our Third Floor. We have enough Dolls and Toys to supply every child in Fort Worth ; every kind of a Doll or Toy any little one could want. from the lowest priced ones up to the finest imported novelties. COME NOW, for the Choicest Toys Go First. Third Floor-Take Elevator
A very attractive display of Character Dolls, with and without hair.
A splendid display of Large Jointed Dolls with handsome wigs-without a doubt the most attractive display in the city. THIRD FLOOR.

Women's Coats. On one rack are gathered 40 Coats, made up in novelty mixtures, boucle, zilieline, novelty plaid, fancy diagonals and chinchillas. Colors are tan, brown, blue, red, gray and black and white mixtures. These coats formerly sold at $11.95, $12.95 up to $16.95

Just 65 New Coats, worth $22.50, $25.00 and $29.50. These just reached us-Coats which our New York representative bought at a 50 per cent reduction, enabling us to give our customers the benefit of this great saving. Among these coats are fancy chinchillas, cut velours, fancy wenves in diagonals, stripes and checks. All colors can be found in this collection, brown, tan, navy, Kelly green, wine, gray, rose, French blue, black and Copenhagen. These coats are really worth $22.50, $25.00 and $29.50.

Dandy Dresses for $10.00. Former Prices $19.50, $21.50 to $25.00. Here are some very special values in Afternoon and Street Dresses, made of serge, wool crepe, charmeuse, crepe de chine, poplin and wool faille. These dresses are of this season's most popular models, including long sleeves, novelty collars, low neck and trimmings of hand embroidery ; ruching and fancy belts, Colors are navy, brown, black, mahogany, Copenhagen, green and wistaria. These dresses are really worth from $19.50, $21.50 to $25.
